privileged_info_summary: The task involves setting three synthetic feeds to public in Emoncms (an open-source energy monitoring software). The target feeds are: campus_grid_power (tagged campus_energy), solar_array_output (tagged campus_energy), and main_hall_temperature (tagged campus_environment). Three distractor feeds exist but must remain private: hvac_compressor_amps, server_room_humidity, and ev_charger_power. The task uses the official openenergymonitor/emoncms:latest Docker image. Success requires making target feeds readable via Emoncms public API without authentication while keeping distractor feeds private. All feeds are synthetically created by the task setup script with sample values.
